title: The Urgency Imperative: Why Post-Quantum Migration Must Start Now
description: Synthesize the quantum threat into actionable urgency. Understand why migration cannot wait, what's at stake, and how to build organizational momentum for post-quantum transformation.
learningObjectives: Articulate the case for immediate PQC migration action
Quantify the costs of delayed migration
Identify common objections and provide counter-arguments
Build an executive-level business case for PQC investment
Develop a phased approach that starts immediately
